title: Create X Pokemon
description: A Modpack That Combines The Like Of Pokemon With Technology
body:
Create x Pokemon – Automation Meets Pokemon

Create x Pokemon brings together the mechanical brilliance of Create and the monster-catching adventure of Cobblemon in one fully integrated experience.

Why choose between engineering and exploration when you can have both?

⚙️ Mechanical Innovation Meets Pokémon-Style Gameplay

Harness the power of rotational energy, kinetic contraptions, and advanced automation to enhance your Cobblemon journey. Build factories, automated farms, Poké Ball production lines, apricorn processing systems, and more — all powered by Create’s immersive mechanical systems.

🌍 A Living, Breathing World

Explore vast biomes filled with Cobblemon while constructing massive moving machines, trains, and automated bases. Whether you're building a high-tech research lab or a fully automated breeding facility, the possibilities are endless.

🔧 Features

Create-powered automation for Cobblemon resources

Custom recipes and progression balancing

Mechanical crafting integrations

Survival-friendly design

Multiplayer ready

🚀 Perfect For:

Tech mod lovers who want more adventure

Cobblemon trainers who love automation

SMP servers looking for a fresh, balanced modpack

Build. Automate. Train. Dominate.

Turn your world into a mechanical monster-training empire with Create x Pokemon.

Join My Discord If Your Interested In A Server
